name: security
description: Security review skills for Claude Code. web-security-review: a best-of-three composite (Sentry, Anthropic, GitHub awesome-copilot) that audits JavaScript/TypeScript web apps for injection (incl. per-ORM raw + SQLite), XSS, authorization (IDOR/BOLA/mass-assignment), auth/session/JWT, SSRF, CSRF, secrets, and crypto — plus conditional passes for self-hosted deployment hardening (Docker, network exposure, reverse-proxy trust) and OIDC/SSO account-takeover. Traces data flow; reports only proven findings (a proof gate, not confidence scores).
